step_rationale: Lymphatic vessel-development signal; post-MI recovery, not atherothrombotic mechanism.
mechanism: Ephrin-B2 directs lymphatic vessel formation and cardiac recovery after ischemic injury, independent of plaque destabilization mechanisms.

references.title: Functions and Regeneration of Mature Cardiac Lymphatic Vessels in Atherosclerosis, Myocardial Infarction, and Heart Failure.
